positive: A whimsical, geometric woodland scene featuring stylized deer and glowing bioluminescent flora among minimalist, geometric trees. The style is sophisticated Scandinavian folk art mixed with neo-Art Deco lines. High contrast, deep jewel tones accented by soft electric cyan and moss green. Focus on clean, bold silhouettes and symmetry. Composition must be centered and suitable for a repeatable print pattern, designed with ample negative space for modern apparel printing. Overhead studio lighting, crisp edges, vector illustration quality, highly detailed yet clean.
